'''nosapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulegyric|ulegyric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulegyric|ulegyric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nosapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosapithi|nosapithi]] || [[word:nosapiji|nosapiji]] || [[word:nosapishi|nosapishi]] || [[word:nosapiki|nosapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosaputhuthu|nosaputhuthu]] || [[word:nosapujuju|nosapujuju]] || [[word:nosapushushu|nosapushushu]] || [[word:nosapukuku|nosapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosaputhu|nosaputhu]] || [[word:nosapuju|nosapuju]] || [[word:nosapushu|nosapushu]] || [[word:nosapuku|nosapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosapufthuf|nosapufthuf]] || [[word:nosapufjuf|nosapufjuf]] || [[word:nosapufshuf|nosapufshuf]] || [[word:nosapufkuf|nosapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosapethe|nosapethe]] || [[word:nosapeje|nosapeje]] || [[word:nosapeshe|nosapeshe]] || [[word:nosapeke|nosapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosapothotho|nosapothotho]] || [[word:nosapojojo|nosapojojo]] || [[word:nosaposhosho|nosaposhosho]] || [[word:nosapokoko|nosapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosapotho|nosapotho]] || [[word:nosapojo|nosapojo]] || [[word:nosaposho|nosaposho]] || [[word:nosapoko|nosapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosapofthof|nosapofthof]] || [[word:nosapofjof|nosapofjof]] || [[word:nosapofshof|nosapofshof]] || [[word:nosapofkof|nosapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfthĂŻf|nosapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfjĂŻf|nosapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfshĂŻf|nosapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfkĂŻf|nosapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nosapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nosapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nosapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nosapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfthĂŻf|nosapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfjĂŻf|nosapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfshĂŻf|nosapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfkĂŻf|nosapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfthĂŻf|nosapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfjĂŻf|nosapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfshĂŻf|nosapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nosapĂŻfkĂŻf|nosapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosapĂŠthĂŠ|nosapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nosapĂŠjĂŠ|nosapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nosapĂŠshĂŠ|nosapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nosapĂŠkĂŠ|nosapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosapathatha|nosapathatha]] || [[word:nosapajaja|nosapajaja]] || [[word:nosapashasha|nosapashasha]] || [[word:nosapakaka|nosapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosapatha|nosapatha]] || [[word:nosapaja|nosapaja]] || [[word:nosapasha|nosapasha]] || [[word:nosapaka|nosapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosapafthaf|nosapafthaf]] || [[word:nosapafjaf|nosapafjaf]] || [[word:nosapafshaf|nosapafshaf]] || [[word:nosapafkaf|nosapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nosapasha|nosapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosapshĂ«asha|nosapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosaproasha|nosaproasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosapmuasha|nosapmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosapyaasha|nosapyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosapnkshĂ«asha|gonosapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosapnkroasha|gonosapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosapnkmuasha|gonosapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosapnkyaasha|gonosapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nosasapasha|nosasapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosasapshĂ«asha|nosasapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosasaproasha|nosasaproasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosasapmuasha|nosasapmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosasapyaasha|nosasapyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosasapnkshĂ«asha|gonosasapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosasapnkroasha|gonosasapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosasapnkmuasha|gonosasapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosasapnkyaasha|gonosasapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nesĂŠpasha|nesĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nesĂŠpshĂ«asha|nesĂŠpshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nesĂŠproasha|nesĂŠproasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nesĂŠpmuasha|nesĂŠpmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nesĂŠpyaasha|nesĂŠpyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonesĂŠpnkshĂ«asha|gonesĂŠpnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonesĂŠpnkroasha|gonesĂŠpnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonesĂŠpnkmuasha|gonesĂŠpnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonesĂŠpnkyaasha|gonesĂŠpnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nosfapasha|nosfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosfapshĂ«asha|nosfapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosfaproasha|nosfaproasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosfapmuasha|nosfapmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosfapyaasha|nosfapyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosfapnkshĂ«asha|gonosfapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosfapnkroasha|gonosfapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosfapnkmuasha|gonosfapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosfapnkyaasha|gonosfapnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
